name: image_load_wmi_module_load_by_uncommon_process
raw_query: any where (file.path like~ ("*\\fastprox.dll", "*\\wbemcomn.dll", "*\\wbemprox.dll", "*\\wbemsvc.dll", "*\\WmiApRpl.dll", "*\\wmiclnt.dll", "*\\WMINet_Utils.dll", "*\\wmiprov.dll", "*\\wmiutils.dll")) and (not (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\Windows\\explorer.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*"))) and (not ((process.executable like~ ("*\\WindowsAzureGuestAgent.exe", "*\\WaAppAgent.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("*\\thor.exe", "*\\thor64.exe")) or process.executable:"*\\MsMpEng.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("*\\Microsoft\\Teams\\current\\Teams.exe*", "*\\Microsoft\\Teams\\Update.exe*")) or (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Windows\\Sysmon.exe", "*:\\Windows\\Sysmon64.exe"))))
